Team

A small team, focused on building things properly.

A close-knit team of engineers with a shared focus on human-centered design, technical depth, and long-term thinking.

AN

Akmal Nazir

CEO · Electronics & Systems Architecture

Akmal leads Halion's electronics and systems architecture, focusing on the integration of hardware, power systems, sensing, and display technologies into a wearable form factor.

AV

Ajith Varikuti

Product Development · Mechanical Engineering

Ajith leads mechanical design and physical integration at Halion, focusing on enclosure design, structural integrity, and wearability.

AR

Aarya Raut

Product Development · Systems & Firmware Engineering

Aarya works on low-level systems and firmware at Halion, bridging hardware and software to ensure reliable, responsive operation.

H
Halion

Augmented reality glasses designed for everyday life. Better technology — designed around the human.
